commands.review_summary:
The branch replaces hardcoded gateway/node handshake versions with `AppVersionInfo.Version`, adds node-only reconnect from persisted node tokens, rewrites exec approval to a native Win32 prompt, updates the manifest, and adds regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: configure `EnableMcpServer=true`, `EnableNodeMode=false`, an active gateway record with a persisted node token, and no operator credential; the PR calls `ConnectNodeOnlyAsync` and returns before `TryStartLocalMcpOnlyNode()` can preserve MCP-only mode.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This draft/member PR needs author or maintainer handling for the security-sensitive startup gate and the unresolved Allow-once runtime timeout before any merge path.

target.title: fix(node): reconnect and report app version after restart
target.body:
## Summary
- replace hardcoded `1.0.0` Windows node/tray handshake version fields with `AppVersionInfo.Version`
- reconnect already-paired Windows nodes on startup using the persisted node device token instead of requiring bootstrap/shared credentials
- preserve credential precedence so startup does not downgrade a paired node from its device token back to bootstrap/shared tokens
- fix the native exec approval prompt loop so real button clicks wake the pending approval path
- add regression coverage for node-only reconnect, SSH tunnel startup, and startup fallback wiring

## Validation
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean on the branch after the earlier review fixes
- CI Build and Test run `26727321535` on `9173e4e`: repo-hygiene, test, e2etests, build win-x64, build win-arm64 all passed
- staged current x64 PR artifact on an Azure crabbox: product version `0.6.0-PullRequest613.736`; PR artifact is expected unsigned
- node identity/version check on current artifact: active paired node stayed on the same device identity, connected=true, pending=0, version reports `0.6.0-PullRequest613.736`
- restart hardening checks on current artifact:
  - Linux gateway restart: same active node reconnected, pending=0
  - Windows tray restart: same active node reconnected, pending=0
  - Windows VM reboot + tray task start: same active node reconnected, pending=0
  - credential files stayed on node device token; no shared/bootstrap token downgrade observed
- exec approval interactive matrix on current artifact using real mouse input:
  - Deny clicked and returned policy denial instead of hanging
  - Allow once clicked, but `node.invoke system.run` timed out after the click in the latest direct-RPC crabbox run
- restored the crabbox approval policy to its original `defaultAction=deny`, 22-rule state after testing

## Known Follow-Up
- Allow-once still needs more hardening. The UI button is found and clicked, but the latest direct `node.invoke system.run` path timed out after the click. I would keep this PR draft until that path is isolated.
- A stale disconnected paired node with version `1.0.0` still exists in the gateway registry, but no duplicate pending request was created and the active node stayed stable.
- PR artifacts are unsigned. The Azure Trusted Signing release workflow remains the path for signed alpha/beta release artifacts.
target.author: vincentkoc
